<!-- Generated with https://github.com/reakaleek/gh-action-readme -->

# <!--name-->Prevent Duplicate npm Release<!--/name-->

<!--description-->
Fail when workflow_dispatch selected an npm version that is already published.
<!--/description-->

## Inputs

<!--inputs-->
| Name                | Description                             | Required | Default |
|---------------------|-----------------------------------------|----------|---------|
| `already-published` | Value from check-npm-version-published. | `true`   | ` `     |
| `version`           | Release version.                        | `true`   | ` `     |
<!--/inputs-->

## Outputs

<!--outputs-->
| Name | Description |
|------|-------------|
<!--/outputs-->

## Usage

<!--usage action="Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/prevent-duplicate-npm-release" version="main"-->

```yaml
steps:
 - name: "Prevent duplicate workflow_dispatch release version"
   uses: "Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/prevent-duplicate-npm-release@main"
   with:
    already-published: "${{ steps.npm_check.outputs.already_published }}"
    version: "${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}"
```

<!--/usage-->
